steps.title: Read the slope of line k
steps.content: Line $k$ is $$y=\frac{3}{4}x+2$$ In slope-intercept form $y=mx+b$, the slope is $m=\frac{3}{4}$.

steps.title: Use parallel slopes
steps.content: Parallel lines have the same slope, so line $j$ also has slope $$\frac{3}{4}=0.75$$ A valid decimal entry is .75.

steps.title: Final answer format
steps.content: The question is free response, so either $\frac{3}{4}$ or the decimal $.75$ represents the same slope. The stored answer uses .75.
